nasb.text: Then Jeremiah said to all the people, to the men and women—even to all the people who were giving him such an answer—saying,

esv.text: Then Jeremiah said to all the people, men and women, all the people who had given him this answer:

cnv.text: 耶利米對全體人民，對那些用這話答覆他的男人、女人和眾民說：

ccb.text: 于是，耶利米对在场所有答复他的男女说：
